name: Category: Improper Fulfillment of API Contract ('API Abuse')
description: This is a category (not a weakness) that groups weaknesses related to software misusing an API contrary to its intended contract. Mapping to this CWE is prohibited since 2019. Specific child weaknesses include CWE-242, CWE-243, CWE-248, CWE-250, and CWE-252.
